creator: jd@ods.org
text:
Edwin,
  Approved.  It's me, just with a different email address.

Thanks!
Jason DiCioccio

> Maintainer of dns/odsclient,
>
> Please note that PR ports/104031 has just been submitted.
>
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
>
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/104031
>
> --
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
